notes: Solid, complete Snake implementation with title/pause/game-over/win states, high score persistence, speed scaling, and audio; minor quirk in self-collision check (tail edge case logic) but overall plays correctly and cleanly.
An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with flawless logic, great visual polish, and sound effects; the only minor flaw is a 1-input queue instead of a multi-input queue for rapid keystrokes.
A solid and fully playable Snake build with pause/title/win states and polished presentation, but it is not perfect due to minor control/input limitations and small UX inconsistencies.
